hooks.prompt: The user just submitted a prompt for the Omnipus project. Analyze whether this is an implementation task (writing code across multiple files, implementing a wave, building a feature). If it IS implementation work AND no agent team is currently active, respond with: {"additionalContext": "REMINDER: Per CLAUDE.md, implementation work on Omnipus requires the omnipus-dev agent team. Create the team with TeamCreate and spawn the relevant teammates (frontend-lead, backend-lead, security-lead, qa-lead) before writing any code. Solo implementation is only for single-file bug fixes, docs, or config changes."}. If a team IS already active or this is NOT implementation work, respond with: {"additionalContext": ""}.

Claude just finished its turn on the Omnipus project. Check: did it write code across multiple files without spawning an agent team? If yes, respond with: {"decision": "block", "reason": "Implementation work spanning multiple files requires the omnipus-dev agent team per CLAUDE.md. Please create the team and delegate to teammates instead of implementing solo."}. If it used a team, or only made single-file changes, or did non-code work, respond with: {"decision": "allow"}.
